creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
Details here: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/need-help-with-snd_hda.91142/

Everything works as expected in Windows 10 and in recent Linux (last Altix was tasted).

It seems that Linux kernel was patched to support this codec:
https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/sound/pci/hda/patch_conexant.c
